title: Tinted Dyes
description: Overhaul of the Dye Mechanics + New Dyes!

Tinted Dyes is an overhaul mod of the vanilla dye system. 

 

This mod has 75 Dye colors total, 16 of which are retextured vanilla dyes.

 

Recipes can be viewed In-game via Just Enough Items.


 

 
![recipe header](https://i.imgur.com/3qROiz0.jpg)
